  "analysis": "The task is complete. I have:

   - Normalizes each row to unit length (since scaling is arbitrary)
   - Outputs the matrix to stdout
   - Saves it to `/app/stolen_A1.npy`
3. Verified that the extracted matrix matches the true A1 up to permutation of rows (all 20 rows have cosine similarity of 1.0 with matched true rows)
